name: MAC-10 | 凝视之眼
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted with a pair of eyes and various words in Russian, including \"control\" and \"fear\". You don't believe them, do you?
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器上绘有一双眼睛和各种词语。 你不相信他们，对不对？
